home.feature1Desc: Select the right crop and fertilizer, and learn related diseases and pesticides.
home.feature2Desc: Access tractors for ploughing and vehicles for transport.
home.feature3Desc: Providers can list manure/tractors and farmers can directly use them.
home.subscribeFail: Failed to send email. Please try again later.

about.title: About Farmer's Assistant
about.intro: Farmer's Assistant is an all-in-one agri platform that helps farmers make informed decisions, improve productivity, and adopt modern farming practices.
about.mission: Our goal is to bridge technology and agriculture by providing timely support to farmers and enabling sustainable growth.

agriHelp.title: Agricultural Assistance
agriHelp.cropListDesc: Select soil type and get crops that can be grown on that soil.
agriHelp.fertilizersDesc: Select soil and crop to get suitable fertilizers.
agriHelp.diseasesDesc: Select a crop and find associated diseases.
agriHelp.pesticidesDesc: Select crop and disease to get recommended pesticides.
